nodes.name: test_search_offline.py
nodes.summary: Model-free contract tests for the enrich→chunk→embed→store→search path, using the deterministic hashing_embedder fixture to validate that filters narrow, output is stable, and the hybrid/RRF path runs without a real model.

nodes.name: test_structural.py
nodes.summary: Exhaustive unit tests for structural.build_structural_model — section-tree construction, preamble synthesis, breadcrumbs, and the deterministic markdown serialization of links, lists, tables, code blocks, and blockquotes.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of hand-built pandoc-AST block/inline literals and small AST-builder helpers (_ast_titled/_para/_header1/_doc/_h1) to exercise the panflute serializer deterministically.

nodes.name: test_template_taxonomy.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for template_taxonomy pipe-table parsing and field extraction, asserting wide vs key-value table orientation handling, pipe unescaping, deterministic canonical JSON, and that body sample values never leak into the taxonomy.

nodes.name: test_tui.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the interactive search TUI — pure helpers (parse_top_k, resolve_section_type, format_preview) plus the Textual SearchApp driven through the headless run_test() pilot for populate/error/empty-index flows.
nodes.languageNotes: Drives the Textual app via asyncio.run + headless run_test() pilot with fake-pipeline SimpleNamespace stubs to keep the test model-free.

nodes.name: test_vector_store.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the Chroma vector-store backend and SearchResult — covering cosine score mapping, upsert counts, scalar-only metadata, where-clause filter assembly, provenance keys (excluding hnsw:*), delete, and reset.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a mocker-built patched_store fixture and a _make_query_response helper to stub Chroma's collection without the optional chromadb dependency installed.

nodes.name: test_vocabulary.py
nodes.summary: Small unit tests for vocabulary load/save JSON round-tripping — verifying sorted/deduped output, empty result on a missing path, parent-directory creation, and str-path acceptance.

nodes.name: test_workspace.py
nodes.summary: Security-focused tests for workspace path resolution — verifying inbox/outbox containment, rejection of outside paths, ../ traversal, and symlink escapes, plus enforce=False escape hatch and ensure_inbox_exists behavior.

nodes.name: TestBuildStructuralModel
nodes.summary: Test suite verifying build_structural_model extracts doc id, title/space metadata, h1/h2 section nesting, breadcrumbs, code blocks with language, paragraphs, lists, and unique block/section ids.

nodes.name: TestPreambleSynthesis
nodes.summary: Tests that content before the first heading (or in a heading-less doc) is attached to a synthesized title-derived root section so a page never yields zero chunks, falling back to a 'document' root when untitled.

nodes.name: TestSemanticSerialization
nodes.summary: Exercises deterministic markdown serialization of every block/inline form — links, inline code, ordered/nested lists, fenced code with language, pipe tables, blockquotes, emphasis, images, and edge cases like empty paras and numbering gaps.

nodes.name: TestSearchResult
nodes.summary: Verifies SearchResult score semantics: score equals 1 minus cosine distance, zero distance is a perfect score, repr surfaces the score, and a fused score overrides the cosine score.

nodes.name: TestSearch
nodes.summary: Tests the Chroma search path: returns SearchResult objects, passes None where with no filters, omits the $and wrapper for a single filter, uses $and for multiple filters, and handles empty results.

nodes.name: TestProvenance
nodes.summary: Tests provenance metadata handling: set_provenance excludes reserved hnsw:* keys and adds provider/model keys, swallows collection.modify errors, and get_provenance returns recorded keys or empty when absent.

nodes.name: TestResolveInput
nodes.summary: Tests resolve_input containment: defaults to inbox root/subpath, allows the inbox root and subfolders, rejects outside paths and ../ traversal, and honors enforce=False to allow escapes.

nodes.name: TestResolveOutput
nodes.summary: Tests resolve_output_dir/resolve_output_file: creates the default subpath dir and a file's parent, rejects out-of-outbox dirs before creating them, rejects out-of-outbox files, and honors enforce=False.
